title: Codings
subtitle: Games, animations, and apps built by our young coders

items.title: Catch the Apples
items.description: Move the basket left and right to catch falling apples before they hit the ground!

items.title: Maze Runner
items.description: Guide the glowing dot from start to finish through a tricky maze.

items.title: Dancing Cat Animation
items.description: A funny cat that dances to the beat. Click the green flag to start the show!
